parameters: Fell down a hole and couldn't get out.
Died on route to Caesite by dehydration.
Died to a monster on route to Caesite.
Fell asleep in the woods at night.
Crashed into a tree while running.

Stabbed in the chest with a kitchen knife.
Stabbed in the chest by a random man.
Stabbed to death by foreign assassins.
Lost in the forest at age 10.
